domain: glass handling, window manufacturing, glazing tools, mirror mounting, and fragile-sheet transport hardware

ideas.product_context: Manual handling aid for lifting and positioning fragile glass panes in window shops or installation sites.
ideas.core_function: Allows an operator to grip a glass sheet with multiple suction pads while the handle assembly pivots to suit different carrying angles.
ideas.likely_main_part: Articulated yoke frame holding suction cup mounts and a central hand grip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines curved suction pads, hinge knuckles, offset handles, and repeated radial features that challenge clear parametric articulation.

ideas.product_context: Shop-floor tool for seating flexible glazing beads or trim strips into window frame channels.
ideas.core_function: Applies rolling pressure along a narrow bead while keeping the operator hand clear of the glass edge.
ideas.likely_main_part: Forked roller head with a contoured wheel and ergonomic handle socket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires modeling a small contoured wheel, fork clearance, handle transition, and contact geometry without relying on simple block forms.

ideas.idea_title: Mirror Clip With Hidden Spring Tongue
ideas.product_context: Mounting hardware for retaining wall mirrors while concealing much of the fastener hardware.
ideas.core_function: Captures the mirror edge with a visible lip while an internal spring tongue compensates for installation variation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Folded metal clip body with a sprung inner tab and countersunk mounting zone.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin folded surfaces, nested retaining lips, elastic-looking tabs, and partially concealed fastening details.

ideas.product_context: Temporary protection accessory used when moving loose panes or mirrors through a workshop.
ideas.core_function: Clamps around a fragile sheet corner to shield both exposed edges from bumps during handling.
ideas.likely_main_part: Soft-lined angled clamp shell with a tightening knob and internal corner cavity.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of angled sheet capture, padded inserts, knob hardware, and protective shell thickness relationships.

ideas.product_context: Assembly fixture used while setting glass units into window sashes before final fastening.
ideas.core_function: Provides multiple selectable spacer steps to hold a pane away from frame edges during glazing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Comb-like stepped wedge with a grip tab and repeated spacing fins.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Uses repeated thin fins, stepped contact faces, tapered profiles, and an intentionally asymmetric hand tab.

ideas.product_context: Transport hardware for moving glass, acrylic, or mirror sheets across a shop floor.
ideas.core_function: Supports a sheet edge in a cushioned channel while low rolling hardware carries the load.
ideas.likely_main_part: Long grooved cradle body with integrated axle bosses and removable cushion liner.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Blends elongated channels, soft insert geometry, wheel mounting bosses, and load-bearing ribs in one part concept.

ideas.product_context: Hand tool for placing small support blocks under insulated glass units inside frames.
ideas.core_function: Holds a setting block at the tip and releases it into a narrow frame pocket without finger access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slim pushrod tool body with a spring jaw nose and thumb release slider.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests slender mechanisms, sliding interfaces, small jaw features, and a tool body shaped for constrained access.

ideas.product_context: Retention hardware for transport racks carrying stacked glass sheets on angled supports.
ideas.core_function: Hooks over a rack rail and swings into place to restrain sheets from shifting during movement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved latch hook with a pivot boss, rubber contact pad, and lock tab.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines hook geometry, pivoting latch logic, replaceable pad placement, and angled rack-contact surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Visible decorative hardware for mounting mirrors slightly proud of a wall surface.
ideas.core_function: Holds a mirror through a finished front cap while spacing the glass away from the wall substrate.
ideas.likely_main_part: Layered circular rosette with a threaded center post and soft washer seat.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires concentric decorative profiles, layered hardware, glass-safe washer details, and front-back assembly relationships.

ideas.product_context: Installer accessory for gently lifting a pane edge during alignment in a frame or opening.
ideas.core_function: Provides a protected lifting contact surface for small height adjustments without direct metal-to-glass contact.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved contact saddle mounted to a compact screw-lift shoe.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests screw-like adjustment cues, padded saddle geometry, compact base stability, and non-flat contact surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Finishing tool for applying and shaping sealant around glass-to-frame joints.
ideas.core_function: Guides sealant into a consistent corner fillet while scraping excess away from adjacent glass and frame faces.
ideas.likely_main_part: Triangular flexible scraper head with edge dams and a removable handle.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Features soft triangular geometry, concave fillet profiles, thin scraping lips, and handle-to-blade interface details.

ideas.product_context: Shop accessory for safely separating stacked sheets that are difficult to grip individually.
ideas.core_function: Creates a controlled gap between adjacent sheets while minimizing edge pressure and surface scratching.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered soft wedge with a flared stop shoulder and textured pull grip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Uses gentle tapering, soft-contact surfaces, anti-slip texture, and stop features that need more than a generic wedge.

ideas.product_context: Hand tool for pressing small retaining points into wooden window frames during pane installation.
ideas.core_function: Guides and drives a flat retaining point at a controlled angle close to the glass surface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Angled nose guide body with a sliding plunger and palm pad.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests angled tool noses, slot-guided fastener paths, plunger travel cues, and clearance near a protected glass plane.

ideas.product_context: Accessory for vacuum lifters used around fragile sheets and finished glass surfaces.
ideas.core_function: Protects the vacuum pump knob and indicator area from impact while leaving them visible and reachable.
ideas.likely_main_part: Open protective cage with arched ribs around a pump cylinder mount.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges open rib structures, protected yet accessible control areas, curved guard geometry, and alignment around an implied cylinder.

ideas.product_context: Hardware used in glass sliding door assemblies to limit travel and prevent hard impact at frame ends.
ideas.core_function: Absorbs door contact through a replaceable bumper held by a rigid frame bracket.
ideas.likely_main_part: L-shaped mounting bracket with a captured elastomer bumper and slotted fastener holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines bent bracket planes, captive soft part pockets, slots, and impact-facing geometry.

ideas.product_context: Installation fixture for placing adhesive backing pads or safety blocks consistently behind mirrors.
ideas.core_function: Indexes from mirror edges and places pads at repeatable positions without marking the reflective face.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat indexing template with edge hooks, pad window cutouts, and finger reliefs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests sheet-like template geometry, cutout arrays, over-edge hooks, and negative-space features.

ideas.product_context: Temporary clamp foot used while bonding or fastening glass into window framing systems.
ideas.core_function: Spreads clamp pressure across a glass-safe contact pad while registering against a frame lip.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped clamp foot body with a soft replaceable pad and frame-locating notch.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires stepped contact planes, pad retention, frame-registering notches, and pressure-spreading form.

ideas.idea_title: Insulated Glass Unit Edge Vent Plug Tool
ideas.product_context: Manufacturing tool for handling small vent or breather plugs in insulated glass unit edge assemblies.
ideas.core_function: Grips a tiny plug, aligns it to an edge spacer opening, and presses it into place.
ideas.likely_main_part: Pencil-like handle with a collet nose and shoulder stop.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests miniature gripping geometry, coaxial tool features, stop shoulders, and small-part insertion affordances.

ideas.idea_title: Fragile Sheet Carry Strap Corner Saddle
ideas.product_context: Accessory used with fabric carry straps for moving mirrors or glass panels by hand.
ideas.core_function: Distributes strap load around a sheet corner so the strap does not abrade or concentrate force on the edge.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved corner saddle with strap slots and cushioned inner faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines curved corner wrapping, strap-routing slots, soft liners, and sheet-edge clearance.

ideas.product_context: Replacement or upgrade part for oil-fed glass cutters used in window and mirror shops.
ideas.core_function: Seals the handle reservoir while providing a controlled fill opening and grip texture.
ideas.likely_main_part: Small threaded cap with knurled perimeter, gasket seat, and flip-fill plug.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests cap threading cues, gasket grooves, knurl-like surface detail, and a hinged or retained fill plug feature.

ideas.idea_title: Glass Shelf Pin With Clear Cushion
ideas.product_context: Support hardware for glass shelves in cabinets, displays, or mirror-backed furniture.
ideas.core_function: Supports a glass shelf from a side panel while a transparent cushion prevents rattling and chipping.
ideas.likely_main_part: Peg-style shelf support with an upturned lip and snap-on cushion pad.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires small support geometry, retained pad interfaces, lip restraint, and visual distinction between rigid and soft components.

ideas.product_context: Tool for applying adhesive glazing tape around sash corners before setting glass.
ideas.core_function: Guides tape around an inside corner while maintaining contact pressure and peel-liner control.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compact guide shoe with a tape channel, pressure roller, and liner deflector.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests channel paths, roller placement, curved corner guidance, and multi-material tape-handling features.

ideas.product_context: Safety accessory for rail-mounted mirror systems used in interiors and retail spaces.
ideas.core_function: Prevents a mirror hanger from sliding off the end of a support rail while remaining low profile.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clip-on rail stop with a snap latch, bumper face, and concealed screw pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rail-gripping undercuts, hidden fastening pockets, snap-fit cues, and contact bumper geometry.

ideas.product_context: Replaceable insert for racks that hold glass sheets upright through wash or drying stations.
ideas.core_function: Separates adjacent sheets with compliant fingers that drain water and avoid edge marking.
ideas.likely_main_part: Comb insert with flexible upright fingers, drainage grooves, and a base locking rib.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated flexible fingers, drainage paths, base locking shapes, and thin feature consistency.

ideas.idea_title: Window Pane Removal Suction Pry Tool
ideas.product_context: Service tool for loosening sealed glass panes from old frames during replacement.
ideas.core_function: Combines suction grip with a protected pry edge to start separation without scraping the glass face.
ideas.likely_main_part: Suction-cup handle assembly with an offset guarded pry blade.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires modeling two functional zones, offset leverage geometry, protective guard surfaces, and cup-to-handle integration.

ideas.product_context: Quality-control accessory for inspecting chips, lamination defects, or edge finish in glass fabrication.
ideas.core_function: Clips a small light source onto a sheet edge at a controlled viewing angle without clamping too hard.
ideas.likely_main_part: Spring clip body with a light cradle, diffuser slot, and soft edge pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests optical accessory placement, compliant clip geometry, pad contact surfaces, and angled feature alignment.

ideas.product_context: Small hardware part used between mirror glass and decorative mounting caps.
ideas.core_function: Prevents rotation of a visible mounting cap while cushioning the glass around a drilled opening.
ideas.likely_main_part: Soft washer with keyed outer profile, raised cushion ring, and recessed fastener area.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges soft washer profiling, keyed non-circular geometry, concentric reliefs, and glass-safe contact zones.

ideas.product_context: Shop tool for storing and presenting horseshoe shims used during glass installation.
ideas.core_function: Feeds one shim at a time from a compact holder so installers can place it while holding the pane steady.
ideas.likely_main_part: Spring-fed magazine body with a side thumb window and shaped shim exit.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests magazine-like internal logic, shaped output slot, thumb access cutout, and stacked thin-part representation.

ideas.product_context: Adjustable retainer for carts or trucks that move multiple glass sheets between workstations.
ideas.core_function: Presses a padded bar against stacked sheets to reduce sway while leaving quick release access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Swinging padded retainer arm with a cam latch and rail clamp base.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines a movable arm, cam-latch shape, padded contact bar, and rail-mounted base geometry.

ideas.product_context: Manufacturing hand tool for shaping or securing spacer frame corners in insulated glass production.
ideas.core_function: Applies localized forming pressure to a spacer corner while supporting the adjacent legs.
ideas.likely_main_part: Pliers-style jaw head with nested corner anvils and replaceable forming inserts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests compound jaw shapes, nested angled anvils, insert pockets, and tool-part relationships around a corner.
